title: menispermum limacia
intro: Menispermum glabrum, also known as Menispermum limacia, is a plant species of the family Menispermaceae, which is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Menispermum limacia include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Menispermum limacia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in Australia and New Zealand.
